title: Alliant Energy (LNT) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Sales Up Y/Y
text: Alliant Energy's (LNT) first-quarter earnings are better than expected. Alliant benefited from increased demand from its expanding electric and natural gas customer base.

title: Alliant Energy Corporation (LNT) CEO John Larsen on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:LNT ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 29, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Zach Fields - Lead Investor Relations Analyst John Larsen - Chair, President and CEO Robert Durian - EVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Michael Sullivan - Wolfe Research Andrew Weisel - Scotiabank Andrew Levi - HITE Hedge Asset Management LLC Ross Fowler - UBS Operator Good morning, and welcome to the Alliant Energy's Conference Call for First Quarter 2022 Results. This call is being recorded for rebroadcast.

title: Alliant Energy (LNT) to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Alliant Energy's (LNT) first-quarter results are likely to reflect the benefits of higher demand and better contributions from regulated investments.

title: Alliant Energy named to Newsweek's first America's Most Trusted Companies list

title: Alliant Energy Corporation Announces First Quarter 2022 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: MADISON, Wis., April 12, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) has scheduled its first quarter 2022 earnings release for Thursday, April 28th, after market close. A conference call to review the year-end results is scheduled for Friday, April 29th at 9 a.m. CT.

title: Alliant Energy: Waiting For A Pullback In This SWAN Utility
text: Alliant Energy's non-GAAP EPS payout ratio was 61.2% in 2021 and should only slightly increase to 62.4% in 2022.

title: Alliant Energy names new Executive Officers
text: Reinforces company's commitment to delivering excellent customer experiences, advancing clean energy transition Reinforces company's commitment to delivering excellent customer experiences, advancing clean energy transition
